title: Divya Prem
desc: A mystical woman performs a powerful ritual and gains immense powers by killing others. However, one woman survives, whose daughter is prophesied to end the mystical woman.

title: Satya Sachee
desc: Fate draws Sachee and Satyaa into the Swarup household through marriage to Shaurya and his cousin. Bound by sisterly love, they find the strength to defy a rigid patriarchy.
